item.title: Kainos
item.description: Welcome to Kainos The world compendium for our campaign. Browse the wiki using the sidebar, search, or follow the links between pages.

item.title: Jasper Lee Wilkins
item.description: Jasper Lee Wilkins Appearance Late 50s but wears it well — lean, sun-weathered, with deep laugh lines and a salt-and-pepper goatee that he keeps immaculately groomed despite everything else about him being slightly disheveled.

item.title: Echoridge Knights
item.description: Echoridge Knights What People Know The Echoridge Knights are an order of dragon riders based in Echoridge.

item.title: Agathon
item.description: Agathon Description A modest town nestled in a shallow valley, built around an old stone cathedral that has stood since before anyone can remember.

item.title: Astran
item.description: Astran Description The largest city on the continent — a proud, ancient capital that sprawls along both banks of a wide river, its skyline dominated by the Citadel at its center where the Keystone pulses with faint light.

item.title: Drosmere
item.description: Drosmere Description A small, practical hunting town at the edge of a vast forest. The buildings are timber and fieldstone, built low and sturdy.

item.title: Elderfen Forest
item.description: Elderfen Forest Description A vast, ancient forest where the canopy grows so thick that daylight barely reaches the floor.

item.title: Kirkwood
item.description: Kirkwood Description A prosperous timber town nestled against a dense forest that never seems to thin no matter how much wood comes out of it.

item.title: Restrend
item.description: Restrend is a broad and wide nation that borders most of all the other ones in Deros. It has an eastern shoreline that closely borders Lythol.

item.title: Tethermoor
item.description: Tethermoor Description Two cliff faces lean toward each other across a dizzying gap, close enough to shout across but too far to jump.
